name: Skillet Corn Bread Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 1 Recipe of AM Cornbread (as seen on side panel)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare cornbread and set aside to cool while chopping vegetables.
2. Finely crumble the cooled cornbread with fingertips and add the spices.
3. In a large skillet, sauté the onion and celery in butter until the onions are translucent.
4. Add the cornbread mixture to the sautéed vegetables.
5. Gradually add water, adjusting more or less to achieve a moist but not soggy mixture.
6. Stir in parsley and sea salt to taste before serving.
